hero.heading: Terms of Use
hero.subtitle: Please read these terms carefully before using our website.

intro: Welcome to Peptide Pure. By accessing or using our website (https://peptidepure.com), you agree to comply with and be bound by the following Terms of Use. If you do not agree with these terms, please do not use our website.

sections.title: 1. Website Access
sections.text: By using our website, you confirm that:
items: You are at least 18 years of age or the legal age of majority in your jurisdiction.
You are using this site for lawful purposes only.
You are not misrepresenting your identity or intent.

sections.title: 2. Permitted Use
sections.text: You may use this website solely for personal or business purposes related to purchasing or learning about our products. You agree not to:
items: Use the website for any fraudulent or illegal activity
Attempt to gain unauthorized access to the website or its servers
Copy, modify, distribute, or reverse-engineer any part of the website or its content

sections.title: 3. User Accounts
sections.text: If you create an account with us:
items: You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your login credentials
You must notify us immediately if you suspect any unauthorized use of your account
You agree to provide accurate and current information

sections.title: 4. Product Use
sections.text: All products sold on this site are strictly intended for research, laboratory, or educational use only. They are not for human or veterinary use, and must not be used for diagnostic, therapeutic, or consumption purposes.
sections.extra: We reserve the right to refuse or cancel orders if we suspect misuse or violation of our product use policy.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.text: All content on this website, including logos, text, images, graphics, and software, is the property of Peptide Pure or its licensors and is protected by intellectual property laws. You may not reuse or reproduce any part of this website without prior written permission.

sections.title: 6. Disclaimers
items: The website and its contents are provided "as is" and "as available."
We make no warranties, express or implied, regarding the accuracy, completeness, or reliability of any information or content.
Use of our website is at your own risk.

sections.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
sections.text: Peptide Pure is not liable for any damages, direct or indirect, arising from:
items: The use or inability to use the website

sections.title: 8. Third-Party Links
sections.text: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content, policies, or practices of those websites and encourage you to read their terms before interacting with them.

sections.title: 9. Changes to Terms
sections.text: We may revise these Terms of Use at any time. Updated terms will be posted on this page, and your continued use of the site constitutes acceptance of those changes.
